title: Context-manifest-connected L0 Discovery Advisor Diagnostics
objective: Connect the read-only L0 discovery advisor to context manifest diagnostics so context-pack workflows can optionally emit advisory L0 discovery suggestions without changing selection, prompt construction, retrieval, or repository state.
proposed_change: Add a proposed diagnostic-only integration path in which context manifest diagnostics may call or embed L0 discovery advisor output under diagnostics metadata. The integration must preserve advisory-only semantics: selection_effect remains fixed to "none", suggested include_l0 IDs are not automatically included, ContextPackManifest.items is not mutated, and provider prompt/latest-context paths remain unchanged.
rationale: CAP-0004 implements a read-only L0 discovery advisor, but the current context-pack manifest workflow does not yet expose those suggestions through manifest diagnostics.
A manifest-connected diagnostic slice can make advisor output visible where context packs are inspected while preserving the diagnostic-only boundary.
The step should remain smaller than automatic L0 inclusion: it only proposes diagnostic emission, not adapter behavior.
Keeping this as a proposed PLAN preserves the canonical governance path: PLAN proposes, WARRANT adjudicates/adopts, and governed improvement acts only after admission.
This slice continues the GAP-0001 path without claiming automatic L0 discovery or modifying context selection.
constraints: No vector index or document index mutation.
No token-budget enforcement or token-budget telemetry.
Any implementation requires separate admission by WARRANT before governed improvement work begins.
success_criteria: SELF_MODEL records PLAN-20260706-0004 as completed with supported completion warrant WARR-20260706-0008.
ContextPackManifest can serialize optional diagnostics metadata without changing manifest_id computation or selected items.
Context-pack workflows can opt in to manifest.diagnostics.l0_discovery_advisor with explicit advisory-only semantics.
Advisor output remains outside ContextPackManifest.items and outside provider prompt construction.
Tests prove diagnostic emission has selection_effect none and no context item, prompt, retrieval, embedding, index, memory, token-budget, reranking, or adapter side effects.
SELF-AUDIT remains green after the completed PLAN, completion warrant, and verification are indexed.
risk: Advisor suggestions surfaced through context manifest diagnostics may be misread as automatic include_l0 selection unless the PLAN, warrant, tests, and future implementation keep diagnostic output separate from manifest items, provider prompts, latest-context paths, retrieval, embedding, indexes, memory stores, token-budget systems, reranking, and adapters.
next_action: No further implementation remains for PLAN-20260706-0004. The manifest-connected L0 discovery advisor diagnostics slice is completed and remains diagnostic-only. Any automatic include_l0 behavior, ContextPackManifest.items mutation, provider prompt change, latest-context prompt change, live retrieval, external embedding API use, production embedding creation, index/store mutation, token-budget telemetry/enforcement, non-none reranking, or adapter behavior requires a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
